title: Manager Skill Levels
description: Managers have varying levels of competence. Better managers cost more but produce better results. Skill affects efficiency, error rates, and ability to handle complex operations.
definition-of-done: Manager skill tiers. Skill affects operation outcomes. Higher skill managers cost more. Skill visible in hiring and management UI.
testing-plan: Verify skill tiers work. Test outcome effects. Verify cost scaling. Test skill display.
